name: Agent Warden Purview DLP
description: DLP plugin for OpenClaw using Microsoft Purview processContent Graph API.

promptGuard.description: L1: Inject DLP security policy into agent context

outputScanner.description: L2: Scan tool output via Purview, redact if blocked

inputAudit.description: L3: Audit inbound messages via Purview

userId.description: Entra user ID (Object ID) in the Purview tenant. Required for app-only auth.

crossTenant.description: Set true when Purview is in a different tenant.
